/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bugbox_headless.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bugbox_headless.dir/src_cpp/headless_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox_headless.dir/src_cpp/dna.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox_headless.dir/src_cpp/nn/nn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox_headless.dir/src_cpp/creature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bugbox_headless.dir/src_cpp/population.cpp.o -o bugbox_headless  -lpthread
